name: Potato and Red Onion Roast (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 2 large Red onions, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Coat the uncooked potato halves and onion pieces in olive oil and seasonings.
3. Spread the mixture in a deep-sided roasting pan.
4. Roast for about 40 minutes, turning the onion/potato mixture several times until all pieces are lightly browned.
Total Calories Per Serving: 471
Fat: 7 grams
